'''ngadocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadministration|coadministration]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadministration|coadministration]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngadocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædecheth|ngædecheth]] || [[word:ngædechej|ngædechej]] || [[word:ngædechesh|ngædechesh]] || [[word:ngædeche|ngædeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadodochoth|ngadodochoth]] || [[word:ngadodochoj|ngadodochoj]] || [[word:ngadodochosh|ngadodochosh]] || [[word:ngadodocho|ngadodocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadochoth|ngadochoth]] || [[word:ngadochoj|ngadochoj]] || [[word:ngadochosh|ngadochosh]] || [[word:ngadocho|ngadocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadofchofth|ngadofchofth]] || [[word:ngadofchofj|ngadofchofj]] || [[word:ngadofchofsh|ngadofchofsh]] || [[word:ngadofchof|ngadofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadochotho|ngadochotho]] || [[word:ngadochojo|ngadochojo]] || [[word:ngadochosho|ngadochosho]] || [[word:ngadochoko|ngadochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadochoth|ngadochoth]] || [[word:ngadochoj|ngadochoj]] || [[word:ngadochosh|ngadochosh]] || [[word:ngadocho|ngadocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadochothol|ngadochothol]] || [[word:ngadochojol|ngadochojol]] || [[word:ngadochoshol|ngadochoshol]] || [[word:ngadochokol|ngadochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadochoothotho|ngadochoothotho]] || [[word:ngadochoojojo|ngadochoojojo]] || [[word:ngadochooshosho|ngadochooshosho]] || [[word:ngadochooko|ngadochooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadochothon|ngadochothon]] || [[word:ngadochojon|ngadochojon]] || [[word:ngadochoshon|ngadochoshon]] || [[word:ngadochokon|ngadochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadochothooro|ngadochothooro]] || [[word:ngadochojooro|ngadochojooro]] || [[word:ngadochoshooro|ngadochoshooro]] || [[word:ngadochokooro|ngadochokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
